headline: Is Oncology Approval And Autoimmune Data Momentum Altering The Investment Case For Amgen (AMGN)?
summary: Amgen recently received European Commission approval for IMDYLLTRA (tarlatamab) to treat adults with extensive-stage small cell lung cancer after platinum-based chemotherapy and presented fresh Phase 3 and real-world data on UPLIZNA and TAVNEOS at the EULAR 2026 Congress, reinforcing their safety and disease-control profiles in rare autoimmune conditions. Together, the new oncology authorization and autoimmune data highlight Amgen’s growing presence in high unmet-need niches, where...
